title: 11 Herbal Tinctures For Cirrhosis
description: Taraxacum officinale tinctures contains sesquiterpene lactones, specifically taraxasterol and inulin, which have anti-inflammatory properties. These properties can help reduce liver inflammation associated with cirrhosis. Taraxasterol also has antioxidant properties, which can protect liver cells from damage caused by free radicals. Inulin can help improve digestion and reduce liver congestion by stimulating the elimination of toxins. By reducing inflammation, protecting liver cells, a...
